description_long: This apartment building complex features two tall, rectangular towers with a modern glass and concrete facade, connected at the base by a lower, brick-clad structure. The towers have large vertical window panels and balconies, with blue-tinted glass sections providing a sleek, contemporary appearance. The base includes a prominent entrance with columns and a red brick exterior, contrasting with the lighter tones of the towers above. The surrounding grounds are landscaped with green lawns and paved walkways, and there is a fenced area with what appears to be a small outdoor communal space. The building's design emphasizes symmetry, with the two towers mirroring each other and the central entrance acting as a focal point. The overall structure is imposing and designed for high-density urban living, likely accommodating many residential units.
description: A modern twin-tower apartment building with glass and concrete facades, connected by a brick-clad base and surrounded by landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin towers, central brick entrance, and landscaped approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass facade, balconies, and fenced communal area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the towers, open green space, and back entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the brick base, glass panels, and side pathways.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with regular spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly pattern across both towers. Some sections feature grouped windows and glass panels, enhancing the modern aesthetic.
